task-task-mratyg3g-03rnzuz4-description.localValue: Completed. Runtime JSON Schema validation now checks `.pinake/pinake.json` and `.pinake/.state/*.json` against the shipped schemas during validation. A formal `Pinakes: Upgrade Pinake` flow upgrades legacy `Pinake/` folders into `.pinake/docs`, preserves discovered documents and legacy module flags, rebuilds state/index files, and records migration history.
task-task-mratyg3g-03rnzuz4-description.remoteValue: Partially completed. The manifest has been refactored to the new `.pinake/pinake.json` source-of-truth shape, the JSON schema was updated, validation now checks document paths/frontmatter/ADR names, and legacy `Pinake/` folders can be safely copied into `.pinake/docs`. Remaining work: runtime JSON Schema execution, a formal upgrade command, migration history application, and deeper compatibility handling.

task-task-mratyg3g-g98b588w-description.localValue: Completed. Validation now includes runtime JSON Schema checks, Markdown style warnings with line numbers, a standalone dependency-free validator with text/JSON/GitHub output, packaged CLI entrypoints, and a command that generates `.pinake/tools/validate-pinake.mjs` plus `.github/workflows/pinake-validate.yml`.
task-task-mratyg3g-g98b588w-description.remoteValue: Partially completed. The current refactor added richer manifest/document validation and expanded VS Code extension tests around `.pinake` storage, legacy copy migration, Explorer settings merge, TreeView preview/edit behavior, and favorites. Remaining work: markdownlint, output formats, CLI or CI callable validator, and GitHub Actions workflow support.

task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-title.remoteValue: Completed: Pinake storage contract inside Pinake/

task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-description.localValue: Updated the storage contract to use `.pinake/pinake.json` as the source of truth, `.pinake/docs` for documentation, and `.pinake/.state` for generated local state. The old visible `Pinake/` folder is now treated as legacy input for safe copy migration.
task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-description.remoteValue: Moved generated Pinake-owned state under Pinake/, including Pinake/pinake.json, Pinake/.pinake/*, and Pinake/.gitignore.

task-task-mratyg3g-p3kiqv3z-description.localValue: Completed the current TreeView UX scope: the Pinake tree is generated from `pinake.json` when available, document clicks open Markdown Preview by default, source editing is exposed through an explicit context action, and existing reveal/copy/properties/sort/rename/delete actions remain available.
task-task-mratyg3g-p3kiqv3z-description.remoteValue: Basic tree actions exist. Finish Explorer-like behavior: richer context actions, keyboard coverage, reveal/copy path/properties, sorting, and polished open behavior.

task-task-mratyg3g-q6phgvy4-description.localValue: Completed the current Pinake setup wizard scope: users select a documentation template, choose optional modules with template defaults, explicitly confirm whether `.pinake` should be hidden from the VS Code Explorer, and generate `.pinake/docs` from data-driven template/module definitions.
task-task-mratyg3g-q6phgvy4-description.remoteValue: Basic preset/module selection exists. Build the full wizard flows for Backend, Frontend, Fullstack, Microservice, Library, and Mobile with conditional questions.

task-task-mratyg3h-tzauzd4b-description.localValue: Completed. Added `Pinakes: Upgrade Pinake` / `pinakes.upgrade` to normalize current manifests, convert legacy `Pinake/` content into `.pinake/docs`, preserve user documents, sync state/version files, rebuild the index, and record migration history.
task-task-mratyg3h-tzauzd4b-description.remoteValue: Implement pinakes upgrade behavior that reads schema versions, applies migrations, records history, and preserves user documents.

task-task-mratyg3h-4kpsma35-description.localValue: Completed. Runtime JSON Schema validation is active for `.pinake/pinake.json` and `.pinake/.state/*.json`, and Markdown style validation now reports trailing whitespace, tab indentation, duplicate or missing H1s, and unclosed fenced code blocks.
task-task-mratyg3h-4kpsma35-description.remoteValue: Integrate Markdown lint checks and runtime validation for Pinake/pinake.json plus Pinake/.pinake/*.json, reporting actionable errors.

task-task-mratyg3h-jbtztjti-description.localValue: Completed. Added `scripts/validate-pinake.mjs` and the `pinake-validate`/`npm run pinake:validate` entrypoints so validation can run outside VS Code with text, JSON, or GitHub annotation output.
task-task-mratyg3h-jbtztjti-description.remoteValue: Expose validation outside the VS Code command path so CI and developers can run the same checks from scripts.

task-task-mratyg3h-kvpgcvdn-description.localValue: Completed. Added `Pinakes: Generate CI Validation Workflow`, which writes a standalone validator into `.pinake/tools/` and a GitHub Actions workflow that runs it on pushes and pull requests.
task-task-mratyg3h-kvpgcvdn-description.remoteValue: Add a command or template to create a GitHub Actions workflow that validates Pinake structure on pull requests.

task-task-mratyg3g-txcl4tcy-description.localValue: Completed. The local index now stores heading metadata, tags, links, backlinks, broken references, and graph edges; search supports snippets plus tag:/heading: filters and improved ranking; changed and deleted Markdown documents can update the index incrementally.
task-task-mratyg3g-txcl4tcy-description.remoteValue: Completed. The local index now stores heading metadata, tags, links, backlinks, broken references, and graph edges; search supports snippets plus tag:/heading: filters and improved ranking.

task-task-mrc7hmkn-a353nn8o-description.localValue: Completed. Added docs/interface-audit.md with a native VS Code interface inventory, friction points, design principles, Light/Dark/High Contrast acceptance notes, keyboard and screen reader expectations, and implementation-ready recommendations that avoid a custom webview.
task-task-mrc7hmkn-a353nn8o-description.remoteValue:
Create a focused UX/UI and visual design audit for the Pinake VS Code extension interface.

Scope the native sidebar, creation wizard, module picker, search results, validation output, properties output, command feedback, and empty states. The outcome should define modern, intuitive, minimalist, and functional design principles that future implementation tasks can follow without introducing a custom webview.

task-task-mraub5i2-7ysys3gr-description.localValue: Completed. Added `docs/component-catalog-roadmap.md` with delivery slices, per-module starter document breakdowns, and acceptance criteria for expanding the full Pinake component catalog. Linked it from `README.md`.
task-task-mraub5i2-7ysys3gr-description.remoteValue: Make the component catalog backlog explicit by enumerating remaining modules from the guide, including Payments, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, Backend, Cache, MessageQueue, Authorization, OAuth, IaC, Monitoring, Logging, Search, Email, DataPipeline, ML, GraphDB, Plugin/Extension, Library/SDK, CLI, Monorepo, Microservice, LegacyMigration, Documentation, Testing, Security, and DevTools.

task-task-mraub5i2-9aw5x8sd-description.localValue: Completed. Added `docs/security-privacy.md` with user-facing local-first behavior, telemetry/network boundaries, workspace write locations, secret-handling guidance, commit policy, and auditability notes. Linked it from `README.md`.
task-task-mraub5i2-9aw5x8sd-description.remoteValue: Add explicit user-facing security documentation for local-only behavior, no telemetry/network calls, workspace filesystem permissions, secret-handling guidance, auditability, and which Pinake files should or should not be committed.

task-task-mrc7hmko-3vflq93l-description.localValue: Completed. Added native TreeView onboarding rows for no-workspace, missing Pinake, and empty `.pinake/docs` states; improved file, folder, favorites, and generated-module icon/tooltips/descriptions; and added extension-host tests for placeholder states and TreeItem metadata.
task-task-mrc7hmko-3vflq93l-description.remoteValue:
Improve the visual design and usability of the Pinake Project Documentation TreeView while staying inside native VS Code UI patterns.

Focus on hierarchy, labels, descriptions, tooltips, ThemeIcons, Favorites, generated/internal files, and an onboarding empty state using VS Code contributions such as viewsWelcome where appropriate.

task-task-mrc7hmkq-96uuar8q-description.localValue: Completed. Added and refined shared native feedback formatting for search QuickPick rows, no-result guidance, validation output, and item properties. Search details now keep paths visible and tags explicit; validation output groups by severity with path/line-first entries and fix hints; properties output is path-first with stable sections and human-readable document metadata.
task-task-mrc7hmkq-96uuar8q-description.remoteValue: Completed. Added a shared FeedbackFormatter for search QuickPick rows, no-result guidance, grouped validation reports with fix hints, and stable item properties output; wired PinakesCommands to use it and added extension tests for the formatted native feedback surfaces.

task-task-mrc7hmkp-jhvgszcy-description.localValue: Completed. Refined the Pinake setup and module generation flows with scannable QuickPick summaries, shorter VS Code-style titles and placeholders, clearer legacy/Explorer/update choices, stricter new file/folder validation, and service-level tests for the changed UX helpers.
task-task-mrc7hmkp-jhvgszcy-description.remoteValue:
Refine the UX/UI copy and interaction design for Pinake setup flows so creating documentation feels faster, clearer, and more intuitive.

Target the template picker, module selection, Explorer visibility choice, legacy migration prompt, existing workspace confirmation, new file and folder prompts, and module generation prompts.

task-task-mrc8tqo3-0jtx6b3p-description.localValue: Completed. Added the packaged `resources/skills/pinake/SKILL.md`, implemented a user-scoped Pinake agent skill installer with safe `CODEX_HOME`/`~/.codex` target resolution and overwrite confirmation, exposed `Pinakes: Install Agent Skill` in the Command Palette and Project Documentation toolbar, and covered install behavior plus contribution wiring with tests.
task-task-mrc8tqo3-0jtx6b3p-description.remoteValue:
Add a packaged Codex-style AI agent skill for Pinake and expose a native VS Code command/button that installs it for the current user.

The packaged skill must live at `resources/skills/pinake/SKILL.md`. Its frontmatter must use `name: pinake`, and its `description` must explicitly trigger when the user mentions Pinake or asks an AI agent to create, maintain, validate, or extend project documentation with the Pinake extension.

The skill body must explain, in precise operational detail, how an AI agent should use Pinake: create project documentation, choose templates and modules, manage `.pinake/docs`, use preview/edit/search/module/validation/CI commands, respect local-only storage, and verify generated documentation.

Add installer UI through command `pinakes.installAgentSkill` titled `Pinakes: Install Agent Skill`. Expose it in the Command Palette and in the `Project Documentation` view title toolbar. The command should copy the packaged skill to `$CODEX_HOME/skills/pinake/SKILL.md`, falling back to `~/.codex/skills/pinake/SKILL.md`; create directories as needed; prompt before replacing a different existing skill; and report the installed path.

Keep installation scoped to the current OS user. Do not attempt system-wide writes or writes into other users' home directories.

task-task-mratyg3h-j0ourc6d-description.localValue: Completed. Expanded the generated module catalog beyond the initial 8 modules with GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, Backend, Cache, MessageQueue, OAuth, IaC, Monitoring, Security, CLI, SDK, and Microservice descriptors, plus API Platform, Platform Services, Cloud Native, and Microservice presets. Added tests for catalog coverage, preset wiring, dependency-aware generation, and representative generated files.
task-task-mratyg3h-j0ourc6d-description.remoteValue: Grow from the initial 8 modules to the full component set from the guide, including GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, Backend, Cache, MessageQueue, OAuth, IaC, Monitoring, Security, CLI, SDK, Microservice, and more.

task-task-mratyg3h-s4207htk-title.localValue: Plan: Pinake automation skill and documentation workflow
task-task-mratyg3h-s4207htk-title.remoteValue: Post-release: Add Calimaco and AI interoperability hooks

task-task-mratyg3h-s4207htk-description.localValue:
Create an in-depth implementation plan for the Pinake extension functionality, feature surface, and documentation automation workflow so `resources/skills/pinake/SKILL.md` can be drafted as a complete operational guide for AI agents.

The plan must explain how an agent should create, update, validate, and professionally optimize Pinake project documentation. It should cover choosing an initial Pinake format when `.pinake` does not exist, using default templates and modules, creating additional files/folders with the same structure when useful, preserving local-only storage, running validation/search/repair/import/export workflows, and maintaining high-quality documentation over time.
task-task-mratyg3h-s4207htk-description.remoteValue: Deferred until after the current Pinake Editor release. Define stable metadata and command surfaces for future Calimaco desktop sync, AI assistant integration, and external tooling.
